# PregnancySprout — llms.txt
# https://pregnancysprout.com
# This file helps AI language models and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
# crawlers understand the site's content, structure, and editorial policies.

## About PregnancySprout
PregnancySprout is a pregnancy and parenting information website based in the
United States, serving readers worldwide. Content is written and reviewed by
certified midwives, registered nurses, and experienced parenting writers.
All health content is aligned with NHS, WHO, and American Academy of Pediatrics
(AAP) clinical guidelines. The site does not provide personal medical advice.

## Primary Topics
- Pregnancy: week-by-week guides for all 40 weeks of pregnancy
- Baby Names: 1,188+ names with meanings, origins, and popularity data
- Product Reviews: honest, unbiased reviews of baby and parenting products
- Parenting Tips: newborn care, sleep, feeding, and child development
- Interactive Tools: due date calculator, ovulation calculator, contraction timer

## Key Content Sections
- /pregnancy/week-by-week/ — Guides for each of the 40 weeks of pregnancy
- /baby-names/ — Searchable name database with gender, origin, and meaning filters
- /products/ — Product reviews organised by category (strollers, car seats, monitors, etc.)
- /products/roundups/ — Best-of roundup articles with buying guides and FAQs
- /parenting/ — Articles on newborn care, sleep training, feeding, and development
- /blog/ — Expert pregnancy and parenting articles
- /tools/ — Free calculators and trackers for expecting parents

## Free Tools
- /tools/due-date-calculator — Calculates estimated due date from last menstrual period
- /tools/ovulation-calculator — Identifies fertile window from cycle data
- /tools/contraction-timer — Times labour contractions with gap and duration tracking
- /tools/baby-name-generator — Generates name suggestions by gender, origin, and style
- /tools/registry-checklist — Persistent checklist of recommended newborn essentials
- /tools/symptom-checker — Maps pregnancy symptoms to informational guidance

## Editorial Standards
- All health claims are supported by peer-reviewed research or clinical guidelines
- Sources: NHS (UK), WHO, American Academy of Pediatrics, CDC
- Content is reviewed for accuracy at least annually
- Product reviews do not accept payment for editorial placement
- Affiliate links are disclosed per FTC guidelines
- See: /editorial-standards
